description_long: This is an adult pedestrian presenting a youthful, urban style. The individual is wearing a sleeveless crop top and a short, pleated skirt with visible seam details, paired with platform lace-up boots and opaque tights. The person has a distinctive hairstyle with hair pulled up into a high ponytail, and a headband or accessory is visible. The facial expression appears neutral, and the arms are relaxed at the sides. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits snugly, emphasizing a casual yet trendy streetwear look. No objects are being carried, and the person is standing upright with a slight lean.
description: A standing adult in trendy urban streetwear, featuring a crop top, pleated skirt, tights, and platform boots, with hair styled in a high ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, crop top, pleated skirt, tights, and platform boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the high ponytail, and the layered look of the skirt and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the crisscross straps of the top, the back of the skirt, and the ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the overall silhouette of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top, pleated mini skirt, opaque tights, platform lace-up boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with a slight lean
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in a high ponytail
